name: Elan Max Cash Preferred Card

welcome_offer.description: No standard welcome bonus; sign-up bonus varies by issuing bank. Some banks (e.g., Associated Bank) offer $150 bonus.

earning_rates.category: Two categories of your choice (Gas/EV, Dining, Grocery, Amazon, Streaming, Home utility, Phone/Internet, etc.)
earning_rates.notes: 5% cash back on your first $2,000 in combined eligible purchases each quarter on two categories you choose; then 1%

earning_rates.category: One everyday category of your choice
earning_rates.notes: 2% unlimited cash back on one everyday category of your choice (e.g., gas, grocery, streaming)
1% unlimited cash back on all other eligible purchases

other_benefits.name: Visa Signature Benefits
other_benefits.description: Includes Travel and Emergency Assistance, Lost Wallet Service, and more

sources.notes: Elan Max Cash Preferred card page

notes: Similar to US Bank Cash+ but with some differences — notably Entertainment as a 5% category option. Issued through partner financial institutions. Some versions are Visa Signature, others are Platinum. Annual fee is $0 standard; some issuing banks may have their own terms.
